§6Schrabidium Cluster§f

§aThe intermediate step towards euphemium — concentrate schrabidium into dense clusters for transmutation!§f

§bSchrabidium Clusters§f are crafted blocks that serve as the raw material for euphemium production. They represent a concentrated form of schrabidium combined with other exotic materials, ready for balefire-induced transmutation.

§6Crafting§f:
Schrabidium Clusters require §bStarmetal§f, §bSchrabidium§f, and §bFerric Schrabidate§f (which itself requires a fusion reactor to produce). The exact recipe combines these materials into a dense cluster block.

§bMaterials needed per cluster§f:
§b• Starmetal — produced via the cyclotron or found in specific structures
§b• Schrabidium — produced via any of the methods from the Schrabidium Creation quest
§b• Ferric Schrabidate — produced in a Chemical Plant using schrabidium and iron-based inputs, requires fusion reactor heat

§6Purpose§f:
Schrabidium Clusters are the essential precursor to §bEuphemium§f. When placed around a balefire bomb and detonated, clusters exposed to balefire are transmuted into §bEuphemium-Etched Schrabidium Clusters§f, which can then be centrifuged into euphemium nuggets.

§eTip§f: Produce a large batch of schrabidium clusters before attempting euphemium production. Each cluster is expensive, and you will need multiple to get a meaningful amount of euphemium. The bottleneck is typically ferric schrabidate, so ensure your fusion reactor is running smoothly.
